title: About
description: Template information, version, and project links.
tagline: An Electron template for personal project bootstrapping: reusable app experience without domain-specific business code.

repo.title: Source Repository
repo.desc: After copying the template, update the repo, appId, app name, and icons first.

contact.title: Contact

license_note: The template defaults to MIT License. Re-check the license when turning it into a private or commercial project.
